Title: Coupons & Promotions Page — Authenticated Access and Page Load
Preconditions: User is authenticated as {{USER_EMAIL}}. Store has at least one active public coupon/promotion configured in Admin. Module VirtoCommerce.MarketingExperienceApi deployed.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/dashboard
[WAIT] Dashboard page loads and sidebar is visible
[ASSERT] sidebar Marketing section is visible
[ACT] click 'Coupons & promotions' link in sidebar under Marketing
[WAIT] page URL changes to /account/coupons
[WAIT] page heading visible
Assertions:
[DOM] page heading reads 'All coupons & promotions' (case-insensitive)
[DOM] sidebar link 'Coupons & promotions' is highlighted/active
[DOM] at least one coupon card is visible on the page
[NAV] URL is {{FRONT_URL}}/account/coupons (or locale-prefixed equivalent)
[FORMAT] page renders without layout broken (no overflow, no missing sections)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /graphql request for promotionCoupons returns HTTP 200
[API] GraphQL response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or unhandled JS errors during page load
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on /graphql during coupons page load
Failure_Signals: Page blank after navigation, spinner visible >5s, 4xx/5xx on /graphql, console TypeError, sidebar link missing

Title: Coupons & Promotions Page — Unauthenticated Access Redirects to Sign-In
Preconditions: User is NOT authenticated (no active session). Store is accessible.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/coupons
[WAIT] page loads or redirect occurs
Assertions:
[DOM] user is NOT shown the 'All coupons & promotions' page content
[NAV] URL is redirected away from /account/coupons (e.g., to /sign-in or /catalog)
[DOM] sign-in form OR catalog page is visible — not coupons content
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no unhandled JS errors
[NETWORK] no 5xx on redirect request
Failure_Signals: Coupons page content visible to unauthenticated user (security failure), 5xx on redirect

Title: Coupon Card — All Fields Displayed Correctly (Name, Description, Code, Label)
Preconditions: User is authenticated. At least one coupon with name, description, and code exists in the system. Confirmed live coupons include QA10OFF (name: 'QA Coupon English Name', description: 'QA Coupon English Description') and AGENT (name: 'Register and get 15% for all', description: 'For new customer get a 15% discount for all items').
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/coupons
[WAIT] 'All coupons & promotions' heading visible
[WAIT] coupon cards visible on page
[SCROLL] scroll through all coupon cards
Assertions:
[DOM] each coupon card displays a coupon name (title text, styled heading)
[DOM] each coupon card with a description shows that description text
[DOM] each coupon card displays a 'Click to copy' button containing the coupon code
[FORMAT] coupon code on button is the code as stored (e.g., 'QA10OFF')
[FORMAT] 'Click to copy' label is visible below the code on the button
[DOM] when a coupon has a label value set, the label text is displayed on the card
[DOM] when a coupon label is null, no empty label element is visible (no broken layout)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /graphql returns coupons data with HTTP 200, errors[] empty
[CONSOLE] no TypeError during render
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on API requests
Failure_Signals: Coupon cards blank or partially rendered, code button missing, console TypeError, spinner >5s, label area shows empty block when label=null

Title: Copied Coupon Code — Apply to Cart Yields Correct Discount (E2E)
Preconditions: User is authenticated. Cart has at least one item ({{TEST_SKU}}). Coupon 'QA10OFF' (promotion: 'QA Coupon English Name', 10% off) is active and eligible for the cart contents. Confirmed live via GraphQL: id d763872c-d5ed-4bc4-99de-271324ef74ed, endDate 2026-12-31.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/coupons
[WAIT] 'All coupons & promotions' heading visible
[ACT] click 'QA10OFF Click to copy' button
[WAIT] 'Coupon copied successfully' notification appears
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loaded with at least 1 item
[SCROLL] scroll to Order summary sidebar
[ACT] click 'Enter a promo-coupon' textbox
[KEY] Ctrl+V (paste copied code)
[WAIT] coupon code 'QA10OFF' appears in the textbox
[WAIT] coupon is applied automatically OR press Enter to apply
[WAIT] discount reflected in Order summary
Assertions:
[DOM] coupon 'QA10OFF' is shown in the 'Enter a promo-coupon' textbox (now disabled/applied state)
[DOM] 'Deny' button appears next to the applied coupon textbox
[DOM] Discount line item appears in Order summary showing a non-zero amount (e.g., '- $29.80')
[MATH] new cart total = subtotal - coupon_discount + shipping + tax
[FORMAT] discount amount displays with currency symbol and 2 decimal places
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /graphql (addCoupon mutation) returns HTTP 200
[API] addCoupon response errors[] is empty
[API] cart.coupons contains code 'QA10OFF' after apply
[CONSOLE] no TypeError during coupon apply
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on /graphql during coupon apply
Failure_Signals: 'Enter a promo-coupon' textbox not found, paste does not fill the textbox, 'Deny' button absent after apply, spinner >5s after apply, errors[] non-empty in mutation response, discount amount is zero after successful apply
Cleanup: Click 'Deny' button to remove QA10OFF coupon from cart after test

Title: GraphQL — promotionCoupons Pagination (cursor-based first/after)
Preconditions: More than 2 active public promotions with coupon codes exist. GraphQL endpoint accessible. User is authenticated.
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
[WAIT] GraphiQL loads
[GQL] execute page 1 query: { promotionCoupons(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}", cultureName: "{{CULTURE_NAME}}", first: 2) { totalCount pageInfo { endCursor hasNextPage } items { id couponCode } } }
[WAIT] response with pageInfo
[ASSERT] hasNextPage = true and endCursor is non-empty string
[VAR] copy the endCursor value
[GQL] execute page 2 query using cursor: { promotionCoupons(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}", cultureName: "{{CULTURE_NAME}}", first: 2, after: "<endCursor>") { items { id couponCode } pageInfo { hasNextPage } } }
[WAIT] page 2 response
Assertions:
[ERRORS] errors[] is empty in both page 1 and page 2 responses
[COUNT] page 1 returns exactly 2 items (items[] length = 2)
[DATA] page 1 pageInfo.hasNextPage = true
[DATA] page 2 items[] contains different ids from page 1 (no duplicate ids)
[DATA] union of page 1 + page 2 items contains no duplicate id values
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] HTTP 200 on both queries
[API] errors[] empty on both responses
[CONSOLE] no errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty, hasNextPage=false when more coupons exist, duplicate items across pages, cursor pagination broken

Title: GraphQL — promotionCoupons Returns Localized Name per cultureName

[WAIT] GraphiQL loads
[GQL] execute en-US query: { promotionCoupons(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}", cultureName: "en-US", first: 20) { items { id systemName name couponCode } } }
[WAIT] en-US response
[ASSERT] note the name value for the test promotion (should be English text)
[GQL] execute de-DE query: { promotionCoupons(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}", cultureName: "de-DE", first: 20) { items { id systemName name couponCode } } }
[WAIT] de-DE response
Assertions:

[DATA] en-US query: name field for the test promotion = the English localized name set in Admin
[DATA] de-DE query: name field for the same promotion (matched by id or systemName) = the German localized name set in Admin

[API] HTTP 200 and errors[] empty on both queries
[CONSOLE] no errors
